entries.title: arckit config CLI command
entries.description: Persistent YAML-based configuration: set/get/list/show/unset with dot-notation keys (llm.base_url, project.default_recipe, etc.). Config file at ~/.arckit/config.yaml.

entries.title: LLM execution layer
entries.description: OpenAI-compatible chat completions, tool-calling loop (Read/Write/Edit/Glob), retry policy, parallelism

entries.title: Recipe parser + DAG computation
entries.description: Parse recipe YAML, topological sort for wave decomposition, validate deps

entries.title: State persistence
entries.description: state.json per project, input-hash staleness detection (SHA-256), resumability

entries.title: arckit build CLI command
entries.description: Recipe -> DAG -> waves -> parallel LLM dispatch. Flags: --plan, --resume, --target, --refresh, --no-commit, --parallel N

entries.title: arckit-data-architecture skill + command + template
entries.description: Phase C.2 — data entities, governance, management strategy, reference/master data

entries.title: arckit-technology-architecture skill + command + template
entries.description: Phase D — infrastructure, platform, network, deployment, integration architecture

entries.title: Recipe integration (DATA + TECH targets)
entries.description: Add DATA and TECH targets to togaf-adm-full.yaml with correct deps

entries.title: Run scripts/converter.py
entries.description: Regenerate Codex skills from updated plugin commands
